s1.title: AN HOANG DIEN
s1.subtitle: Sale Executive
s1.body: Adaptable B2B Sales Executive with practical experience in market development and client management. Core expertise includes Key Account Management for retail partners, executing regular market visits, and analyzing Sell-in/Sell-out data to monitor inventory and drive business growth. Resilient, action-oriented, and ready to tackle on-the-ground challenges to achieve revenue targets.
highlights: Adaptable B2B Sales Executive with practical experience in market development and client management.
Core expertise includes Key Account Management for retail partners, executing regular market visits, and analyzing Sell-in/Sell-out data to monitor inventory and drive business growth.
Resilient, action-oriented, and ready to tackle on-the-ground challenges to achieve revenue targets.

s5.title: Work Experience
s5.subtitle: 05/2025 - Present | Song Nhac Trading and Service Co., Ltd | B2B Sales Executive
s5.body:
B2B Sales & Account Management: Managed retail partnerships and dealer networks for professional audio equipment (karaoke systems, speakers, microphones), executing daily sales activities to hit monthly revenue targets.
Store Checks & Inventory: Conducted field visits to monitor competitors, optimize Display Share at dealer shops.
Trade Promotion & Consultation: Deployed offline promotional campaigns and provided technical consultation to retail partners to boost sell-out rates.
